Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Should there be a guide to Iskcon or vaisnavavism?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-09-07 · 2 answers
If a newcomer google Iskcon,Krishna,vaisnavism,hell get all sorts of communities that differ among themselves: official Iskcon-Ritviks-Gay Krishnas-Gaudiya Math-World Vaisnava Association-Independant Temples-IRG-IRM...etc etc....
Just as Christianity is split into thousands of sects,maybe there should be a guide to vaisnavism,so that the newcomer can find his way in this confusing mela?
user [12] · 2007-09-08
Vishnumurti prabhu in BBT will maintain www.vanipedia.org as a resource and also www.krishnapedia.org in the future. Now krishnapedia is live if anyone wants to add questions & answers.
user [38] · 2007-09-08
A good idea.

WVA groups and their founders: http://www.wva-vvrs.org/

Regarding identification of ISKCON and non-ISKCON sites, we have a list here: http://www.veda.harekrsna.cz/bhaktiyoga/intro.htm#6
